statusLine.command: printf '%b' "$(jq -rj 'def c(p): if p>=90 then "\\033[31m" elif p>=70 then "\\033[33m" else "\\033[32m" end; def R: "\\033[0m"; def burn(u;e): if u>=90 then "\\033[31m" elif (e>0 and u>e*1.5) then "\\033[31m" elif u>e then "\\033[33m" else "\\033[32m" end; (.context_window.used_percentage // 0 | floor) as $x | "\\033[36m[\(.model.display_name)]\\033[0m " + (if .rate_limits.five_hour then (.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage|floor) as $u | (.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // now) as $rst | (($rst - now) | if . < 0 then 0 else . end | floor) as $rem | ($rem/3600|floor) as $h | (($rem - $h*3600)/60|floor) as $m | ((18000 - ($rst - now)) / 18000 * 100 | if . < 0 then 0 elif . > 100 then 100 else . end) as $e | burn($u;$e)+"5h \($u)%"+R+" \\033[2m" + (if $h>0 then "\($h)h\($m)m" else "\($m)m" end) + " left\\033[0m \\033[2m|\\033[0m " else "" end) + c($x)+"ctx \($x)%"+R')"
